roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Release with Coordinated Pickup

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:CJ 28 D/CTS:28/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/4019HALF/SUSFF/CTORD:ANY VICTIM RESTITUTION OWED IS NOT STAYED/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY VICTIM RESTITUTION FROM THIS MATTER MAY BE ADDED AS A TERM AND CONDITION OF THE REINSTATED PROBATION IN CASE #17013089,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MISDRED1:COURT 1/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIM HRG/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/DEF:MUST SUBMIT TO A DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY A SFSD SWORN EMPLOYEE/WEAP/NALC/RX/DEF:MUST REMAIN WITHININTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSD SWORN EMPLOYEE//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE:1 HOUR/

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECALL BW/BWR:09-10-20/BWR1/OR/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO BE ONGPS, EM THROUGH APD TEMPORARILY, DEFENDANT WILL NEED TO BE ON GPS THROUGH SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/12    XPROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND   STAYED TO09-10-20/X: BAIL SET AT $15,000/CTORD:THIS BENCH WARRANT STAY IS TO BE HEARD IN DEPT 7/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT STAY STATUS AND I&A,P&C/DOP
/CAL: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING (TERMINATION FROM BHC)/CONTD:  TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:BW STAY/BWLIFT:09-08-20/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:15000/X:2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE /NIGHTSERV/
